preReview.title: Houston Dynamo vs. Portland Timbers: 'Van a ser partidos abiertos' – Neville se prepara para un cierre agitado
preReview.description: Los Portland Timbers enfrentan a un Houston Dynamo en busca de los playoffs en su próximo partido de la MLS mientras buscan consolidar su lugar entre los nueve primeros.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Portland Timbers: 'They are going to be open games' – Neville preparing for hectic run-in
preReview.description: The Portland Timbers face playoff-chasing Houston Dynamo in their next MLS match as they look to cement their spot in the top nine.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Portland Timbers: 'Saranno partite aperte' – Neville si prepara a un finale di stagione movimentato
preReview.description: I Portland Timbers affrontano gli Houston Dynamo, in corsa per i playoff, nella loro prossima partita di MLS cercando di consolidare il loro posto tra le prime nove.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo x Portland Timbers: 'Serão jogos abertos' – Neville se prepara para reta final agitada
preReview.description: O Portland Timbers enfrenta o Houston Dynamo, que busca uma vaga nos playoffs, no próximo jogo da MLS, enquanto tenta garantir sua posição entre os nove primeiros.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Portland Timbers : « Ce seront des matchs ouverts » - Neville se prépare à une fin de saison mouvementée
preReview.description: Les Portland Timbers affrontent les Houston Dynamo, qui visent les playoffs, dans leur prochain match de MLS alors qu'ils cherchent à consolider leur place dans le top neuf.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo gegen Portland Timbers: 'Es werden offene Spiele' – Neville bereitet sich auf hektisches Saisonfinale vor
preReview.description: Die Portland Timbers treffen in ihrem nächsten MLS-Spiel auf die Playoff-ambitionierten Houston Dynamo, während sie versuchen, ihren Platz in den Top Neun zu festigen.

preReview.title: هيوستن دينامو ضد بورتلاند تمبرز: 'سوف تكون مباريات مفتوحة' - نيفيل يستعد لجولة مجنونة
preReview.description: يواجه فريق بورتلاند تمبرز خصمه هيوستن دينامو، الذي يسعى إلى التأهل للتصفيات، في مباراته المقبلة في الدوري الأمريكي للمحترفين حيث يحاول تعزيز موقعه في المراكز التسعة الأولى.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo x Portland Timbers: 'Serão jogos abertos' – Neville se prepara para reta final agitada
preReview.description: O Portland Timbers enfrenta o Houston Dynamo, que busca uma vaga nos playoffs, em sua próxima partida na MLS, enquanto buscam consolidar sua posição entre os nove primeiros.

QAData.question: Who won between Houston Dynamo FC and Portland Timbers on Sun, 21 Sep 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Houston Dynamo FC won 1–0 over Portland Timbers on Sun, 21 Sep 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
